title: Tuffgrip Super Plastic Rubberized Anti-Skid, Non-Slip Food Tray, Round, 16" / 40cm Diameter, Black
features: MATERIAL: Made from a high quality and durable plastic with non-slip rubber coating on top
SIZE: Round serving tray with 40cm (16 inch) diameter
ELIMINATE EVERYDAY ACCIDENTS: Completely avoid the risk of spilling food or drinks in the home, office or in professional catering environments (hotel, restaurant, café, bar)
DISHWASHER SAFE: In case of spills, the tray can simply be wiped clean with hot soapy water or placed in the dishwasher
HUGE SELECTION: A wide range of sizes are available, with round or rectangular shapes to choose from. The trays are available either unboxed or in a white gift box
description: From the manufacturer A Tradition of Design and Craftsmanship Since 1945, Grunwerg, located in the steel city, Sheffield, has thrived, crafting top-tier household and catering products, specialising in high-quality steel. Our high-quality, award-winning range is the preferred choice for professionals and esteemed chefs in the food industry. What makes us unique? 75 years of experience passed through generations of the Grunwerg family A passion to craft high quality products made from premium materials. A blend of Sophistication and Practicality Non-Slip Rubber Coating: Fear no spills! Our trays boast a non-slip surface, giving you a secure grip for smooth serving. Perfect for Every Occasion: Our round and rectangular trays come in various sizes, available individually or in a convenient pack of 6. Dishwasher Safe: Pop it in the dishwasher for a hassle-free clean, or simply wipe it with hot soapy water to keep it looking pristine. Technical Details Care instructions ‎Wipe With Damp Cloth or place in the dishwasher Finish Types Non-slip, rubber finish Oven Safe No Dishwasher Safe Yes
